creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #5)
> Created attachment 148841 [details]
> WORKING Poudriere Build Log for the updated www/micro_httpd port
> 
> Told you I would upload the successful build log. And it wasn't too long ago
> I posted the new patch.

Yes, very nice, but I don't see the stage-qa checks in the log.

Did you use "poudriere bulk -t" or "poudriere testport" options?  This looks like poudriere bulk without the "-t" option set to me.
